{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/137510281?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/baradika", "id": 137510281, "login": "baradika", "node_id": "U_kgDOCDI9iQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53634", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
The create and store endpoints of the Quick Creation Command feature did not enforce any authorization check. An authenticated Sharp user without create permission on a given entity could bypass the authorization layer and either retrieve the creation form or submit new records for that entity, as long as it had a Quick Creation Command handler configured.

### Patches
Yes. The fix is included in version 9.22.3. Users should upgrade to that version or later.

### Workarounds
Remove or disable Quick Creation Command handlers (quickCreationCommandHandler()) on any entity list where unauthorized access is a concern, until an upgrade is possible.

### Resources
[PR #729](https://github.com/code16/sharp/pull/729)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00213, "percentile": 0.11572}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-08T20:24:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53634"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T22:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-07-08T20:24:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/code16/sharp/security/advisories/GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53634", "https://github.com/code16/sharp/pull/729", "https://github.com/code16/sharp/commit/aa18a85fd8fef830988a336cad2278986729d21a", "https://github.com/code16/sharp/releases/tag/v9.22.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/code16/sharp/security-advisories/GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/code16/sharp", "summary": "Sharp Missing Authorization Check in Quick Creation Command Endpoints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-08T20:24:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmwx-m75v-qvch", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.22.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "code16/sharp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 9.0.0, < 9.22.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Sharp Missing Authorization Check in Quick Creation Command Endpoints
